channel.title: AWS S3 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AWS S3 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Storage Mover enables private data transfers from AWS S3 to Azure Blob
item.description:
Azure Storage Mover is now in public preview for private transfers from AWS S3 in a Virtual Private Cloud to Azure Blob Storage. It supports secure private networking and automation, reducing the need for manual pipelines or third-party tools.

  • Source: Azure Updates
